## 📝 Documentation Changes
*This PR introduces changes to the MujinOS documentation system.*

### Type of Change
- [ ] New Feature Documentation
- [ ] Safety/Compliance Update (High Priority)
- [ ] API/SDK Reference Change
- [ ] Bug Fix/Typo

### Quality Checklist
- [ ] **Linting:** I have run the Vale linter and fixed prose errors.
- [ ] **Safety:** Any hardware-related changes include the required `!!! danger` or `!!! warning` admonitions.
- [ ] **Persona:** The content is placed in the correct directory (`/operator` or `/developer`).
- [ ] **i18n:** I have updated the Japanese (`/ja`) placeholder or notified the localization team.

### 🤖 Automated Checks
- [ ] API Docstrings are updated in `src/`.
- [ ] All internal links are verified.
